detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 美國短篇文選 (Selected American Short Stories and Articles)	開課班級 : 應英三年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 陳宛利	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
-To enhance students' ability to critically analyze and interpret a wide range of readings on complex themes -To develop students' abilities to articulate their ideas and findings effectively in both written and verbal forms -To facilitate discussions on contemporary issues related to sustainability and cultural heritage -To inspire interest in learning about and addressing the critical challenges facing our world today 


2.教學綱要
This course explores a diverse selection of American literature, focusing on critical themes such as the impact of modern advances and capitalism on sustainability, and the relationship between civilization, nature, and indigenous cultures.Through engaging activities, discussions, and projects, students will deepen their understanding of these complex issues, enhancing their analytical and critical thinking skills.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Assessment: Quiz, attendance & in-class performance(40%); Midterm Exam (30%); Final Exam (30%) 
Course Requirements: Students are expected to attend all the class sessions and attend each class with course materials. Late arrival, coming to class empty-handed, or being a phubber in class will lead to a deduction of the final grade. Be on time and come prepared to learn and contribute. Students will be selected at random to answer questions and be graded based on how well they demonstrate understandings of the reading. No make-up quizzes for your absences. Understand and be responsible for your grade.
